title: Glow Trims
description: Fabric mod adding emissive (glowing) armour trims.
body:
# Glow Trims
Adds emissive armour trims, crafted by putting a trimmed piece of armour and a glow ink sac into a smithing table.

![The crafting of a glow-trimmed armour piece with a glow ink sac.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4500669ea385ed169889d2aa543d5c55e851f59.png)

The glow can be removed by doing the same thing with a normal ink sac.

![A player wearing fully glow-trimmed armour.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b71c46aace4c76c202a229507d54d6bb10cb794_0.webp)
